name: Handpan Master Series
description: Experience the pinnacle of handpan craftsmanship with our Master Series.
descriptionLong: Each instrument is meticulously handcrafted in Spain using premium nitrided steel, ensuring exceptional sound quality and durability. This handpan features a rich, resonant tone with perfect harmonic balance.

name: Shamanic Drum
description: Connect with ancient rhythms through our authentic Shamanic Drum.
descriptionLong: Handcrafted in Spain using traditional methods, this drum produces deep, resonant tones perfect for meditation, healing ceremonies, and spiritual practices.

name: Crystal Singing Bowl
description: Experience the pure, ethereal tones of our Crystal Singing Bowl.
descriptionLong: Handcrafted in Spain from 99.9% pure quartz crystal, this bowl produces healing frequencies that resonate with the body's energy centers.
